notes: FOR loop, EVAL, RTOI, and // are all used correctly for parametric construction. However: (1) masses are created with PART/ short-form using near-zero IP rather than 'part create point_mass'; (2) spring-dampers use SPRING/ legacy syntax instead of 'force create element_like translational_spring_damper'; (3) the first mass ground constraint uses a FIXED joint, which Adams rejects on point masses — should be a spherical joint or atpoint primitive; (4) no geometry (sphere/cylinder) is added to any mass; (5) all object references use numeric adams_ids via the /id notation rather than dot-path names; (6) not validated in Adams View.
